question:
User 'bob@corp.com' with role 'viewer' requests access to resource 'financial_reports' which requires 'editor' role. Access is denied. Return ONLY this JSON object with NO markdown, NO explanations:

{
  "user_id": "bob@corp.com",
  "resource": "financial_reports",
  "user_roles": ["viewer"],
  "required_roles": ["editor"],
  "access_granted": false,
  "denial_reason": "Insufficient permissions: requires editor role"
}
